violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. Serve safe for certified manager expired in 2020.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. The drain line for the three compartment sink is leaking. A bucket was placed underneath to catch the water.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Opening in wall was filled in and has not been finished. This area has exposed studs and sheetrock
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Holes in the flooring in the meat department.

General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment, was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. The door to the outside in the meat department had a large gap at the bottom.
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
